evals.name: basic-assigned-query
evals.prompt: what issues are assigned to me on GitHub?
evals.expected_output: A markdown dashboard showing open items grouped by repository with role badges ([assigned]/[author]/[mentioned]) and type badges ([issue]/[pr]) on every item, repository headings with 📦 prefix, and a summary footer

assertions.name: role-badges-on-every-item
assertions.text: Every item has a role badge: [assigned], [author], or [mentioned]

assertions.name: type-badges-on-every-item
assertions.text: Every item has a type badge: [issue] or [pr]

assertions.name: grouped-by-repo
assertions.text: Output is grouped by repository with ## headings

assertions.name: summary-footer
assertions.text: Output includes a summary footer showing total count and repo count

assertions.name: uses-search-issues
assertions.text: Uses gh search issues with --assignee @me and --include-prs

evals.name: mentions-query
evals.prompt: show me what I'm mentioned in on GitHub
evals.expected_output: A markdown dashboard showing open items where the user is @mentioned (plus any assigned items) with role and type badges on every line

assertions.name: merged-results
assertions.text: Output includes items from both assigned and mentions queries

assertions.name: dashboard-format
assertions.text: Output uses 📦 repo headings and summary footer

evals.name: include-closed
evals.prompt: show me my full GitHub workload, open and closed items
evals.expected_output: A markdown dashboard showing items across all states (open, closed, merged) with role badges, type badges, and state icons for non-open items

assertions.name: includes-closed
assertions.text: Output includes items with state ❌ or ✅ icons (closed/merged)

assertions.name: dashboard-format
assertions.text: Output uses 📦 repo headings and summary footer
